use_codes.desc: REDUCTION OF INTRAOCULAR PRESSURE (IOP) IN PATIENTS WITH OPEN-ANGLE GLAUCOMA OR OCULAR HYPERTENSION

indications.text:
VYZULTA™ (latanoprostene bunod ophthalmic solution) 0.024% is indicated for the reduction of intraocular
pressure (IOP) in patients with open-angle glaucoma or ocular hypertension.

pressure (IOP) in patients with open-angle glaucoma or ocular hypertension.
